identity.name: E1 Corporate SaaS
identity.tone: Professional, Trustworthy, Efficient, High-Contrast Swiss Style
design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Poster layouts with SaaS density.
Emotion First: Trust and Stability above all.
Content is King: Data must be legible; vCards must be scannable.
Zoom In: Focus on the individual (headshots) and the connection (QR).
Negative Space: Luxury is space. Don't crowd the card.

usage_rules: Use Serif (Playfair) ONLY for main Landing Page headings and Name on vCard.
Use Sans (Inter) for all Dashboard UI, inputs, and body text.
Use Mono for API keys, IDs, or technical data.

rules: Use Gold (#C5A059) sparingly for 'Pro' badges or primary call-to-actions on dark backgrounds.
Dashboard must be high-contrast: Dark text on white/gray surface.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 transition-all

cards.dashboard: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.vcard: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 shadow-xl border-t-4 border-accent overflow-hidden relative

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

specific_instructions: Use Shadcn UI for all interactive elements.
Customize Shadcn radius to be smaller (rounded-sm) for a corporate feel.
Dashboard cards should be dense and data-rich.
vCard view must be optimized for mobile screens (max-width: 480px).

hero_professional.usage: Landing page hero section or example vCard profile

feature_office.usage: Background for login/signup or 'About Us' section

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 24px for navigation

universal_guidelines: No generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle textures.
Layouts must be responsive and mobile-first.
Dark mode is 'Business Class' - deep blues and blacks, not pure black.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Use 'qrcode.react' for generating QR codes with error correction level 'M' or 'H'.
Ensure vCard data is formatted correctly (VCARD format 3.0 or 4.0) for maximum compatibility.
For the vCard: It must be downloadable as a .vcf file AND scannable via QR.

implementation_steps: 1. Setup Tailwind theme with new corporate colors and fonts.
2. Install dependencies: qrcode.react, recharts, framer-motion, lucide-react, sonner.
3. Create Layout components: DashboardLayout (Sidebar + Header), AuthLayout (Split screen), PublicLayout (Footer + Nav).
4. Develop Core Components: VCardPreview (Mobile view), QRCodeGenerator (Canvas/SVG), PricingCard.
5. Build Pages: Landing, Login/Register, Dashboard (Home, Cards, Analytics, Settings).
6. Implement vCard logic: Generate vCard string -> Embed in QR -> Download function.
